workflows.type_text: Click anywhere in the text area (the large white space). Start typing. Text appears at the cursor position.
workflows.save_as: Press Ctrl+Shift+S. Type the filename in the 'File name' field. Navigate to the save location using the left sidebar or address bar. Click Save. If a 'Save as Markdown' dialog appears, click 'Save as text file'.
workflows.save: Press Ctrl+S. If unsaved, a Save dialog opens — type filename and click Save.
workflows.find_replace: Press Ctrl+H for Find and Replace. Type search text, type replacement, click Replace All.
workflows.select_all: Press Ctrl+A to select all text.
workflows.new_file: Press Ctrl+N for a new empty document.

layout.text_area: The large white space — this is where ALL typing happens

tips: The text area is the entire large white space. Just click it and start typing.
Use Ctrl+Shift+S (NOT Ctrl+S) when you need to save with a specific filename.
If a 'Save as Markdown' dialog appears, click 'Save as text file' for .txt files.
Windows 11 Notepad supports tabs — each tab is a separate document.
